tools.name: deploy_financial_risk_intelligence
tools.description: Deploy Financial Risk Intelligence — explainable credit risk scoring, real-time fraud detection (rules→ML→LLM), market sentiment analysis, regulatory reporting (ECOA/GDPR/Basel III), audit trails.

tools.name: evaluate_financial_risk_intelligence
tools.description: Evaluate Financial Risk Intelligence quality — credit scoring accuracy, fraud detection precision/recall, explainability compliance, fairness across protected attributes, regulatory audit readiness.

tools.name: tune_financial_risk_intelligence
tools.description: Tune Financial Risk Intelligence — fraud decision thresholds, risk score calibration, LLM usage ratio, fairness constraints, explainability depth, latency optimization, cost per transaction.
